caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses, wearing a light green embroidered top and a dark necklace, speaks against a plain black background. In the first frame, she is speaking with her mouth open and gesturing with both hands raised to her sides. As the scene progresses, her mouth closes slightly and her hands lower. In the subsequent frames, she continues to speak, with her facial expressions shifting and her hands moving slightly, primarily remaining at waist level. A small logo featuring a stylized sun and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the first and third frames, and in the bottom center of the second and fourth frames. The lighting remains consistent throughout, focusing on the woman as she delivers her presentation.
